pi_items.source: setup_task.sh line 13: PROJECT_DIR=/home/ga/ecommerce-platform is hardcoded and used to create the project directory
setup_task.sh creates the file at $PROJECT_DIR/docker-compose.yml with correct filename
Task description explicitly states 'Base services (Always start, NO profile): postgres, redis' and these are defined first in setup_task.sh
Task description: 'Currently, docker compose up starts all 8 services'. Verified in setup_task.sh: postgres, redis, nginx, storefront, api, worker, test-runner, prometheus
Task description: 'frontend profile: nginx, storefront (plus base services)'. Matches metadata exactly. All services defined in setup_task.sh
Task description: 'backend profile: api, worker (plus base services)'. Matches metadata exactly. All services defined in setup_task.sh
Task description: 'debug profile: test-runner, prometheus (plus base services)'. Matches metadata exactly. All services defined in setup_task.sh
Task description: 'full profile: nginx, storefront, api, worker, test-runner, prometheus (plus base services)'. Matches metadata exactly. Contains all 8 services defined in setup_task.sh

privileged_info_summary: The task creates a synthetic multi-service Docker Compose project at /home/ga/ecommerce-platform with 8 services: postgres, redis, nginx, storefront, api, worker, test-runner, and prometheus. The metadata correctly specifies that base services (postgres, redis) should have no profile and always run. The frontend profile includes nginx and storefront; the backend profile includes api and worker; the debug profile includes test-runner and prometheus; and the full profile includes all 8 services. All metadata claims are consistent with the task description and setup script implementation.
